use.flag: Enable CUDA acceleration via nvidia cublas/cudnn and onnxruntime-gpu (requires packaging dev-python/{nvidia-cublas-cu12,nvidia-cudnn-cu12,onnxruntime-gpu} and dev-python/pyannote-audio first)
Enable speaker diarization via dev-python/pyannote-audio (requires packaging dev-python/pyannote-audio first)

pkgmetadata.longdescription: Speaches (formerly faster-whisper-server) is an OpenAI-API-compatible server for speech-to-text and text-to-speech powered by faster-whisper and CTranslate2. NOTE: upstream renamed the project from fedirz/faster-whisper-server to speaches-ai/speaches at v0.6.0 (2025-01-13); the deployed container image at /storage/docker/whisper retains the old image name and must be replaced in place when migrating to the new upstream name.
